---
title: '10/18/14 | People Skills'
date: '2014-10-19T04:03:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7146487140451588279'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/101814-people-skills.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir=ltr>I'm tired of having awkward conversations where I either have nothing to say or talk about myself the whole time. My mind is so full so often running on high, that tapping it creates information dump. I need to engage the learner side of my personality and ask more open ended questions. Let's create a list of open ended questions and get curious about people, without turning it into a tasks list.</p>
